features.name: right shift on signed integer with shift amount exceeding bit width
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation on a signed integer where the shift amount is a large literal that exceeds the operand's inferred bit width
features.snippet:
logic signed [1:0] a;
logic signed [21:0] r = a >>> 21;

features.name: shr operation with constant operand and large shift amount
features.description: Code should include a shift-right primitive operation applied to a constant integer value with a large literal shift amount that exceeds 32 bits
features.snippet:
logic signed [7:0] val = 8'sb1011100;
logic [31:0] result = val >>> 64;
